payload.claim_text: Summary of B&T workforce numbers, new hires, separations, Employee Resource Group (ERG) events and accomplishments, and complaints. The Diversity and Equal Opportunity Report provides information quarterly and included in the Committee Book.
payload.description: Recurring agenda item: Diversity and Equal Opportunity Report - quarterly workforce summary.

records.raw_text: Diversity and Equal Opportunity Report - Summary of B&T workforce numbers, new hires, separations, Employee Resource Group (ERG) events and accomplishments, and complaints. The Diversity and Equal Opportunity Report provides information quarterly and included in the Committee Book.

payload.claim_text: Summary presentation of the financial indicators for the month, which includes the Balance Sheet for the reported month, Accrual Statement of Operations for the month and year-to-date, variance analysis, traffic volume and ridership information, toll collection rates, and headcount charts. The Financial Report is provided on a one-month lag, except in the month of September, at which time it includes the July and August reports.
payload.description: Recurring agenda item: Financial Report - monthly financial indicators summary.

records.raw_text: Financial Report - Summary presentation of the financial indicators for the month...

payload.claim_text: A summary of major MTA Bridges and Tunnels Key Performance Indicators (KPIs), featuring graphics and analyses covering Traffic Trends, Safety Performance, Enforcement Activity, Financial Results, and Major Project Updates.
payload.description: Recurring agenda item: Key Performance Metrics - KPI summary covering traffic, safety, enforcement, financial results, and major project updates.

records.raw_text: Key Performance Metrics - A summary of major MTA Bridges and Tunnels Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)...

payload.claim_text: Approval of the official proceedings of the Committee Meeting.
payload.description: Recurring agenda item for the Bridges and Tunnels Committee: Approval of Minutes.

records.raw_text: Approval of Minutes - Approval of the official proceedings of the Committee Meeting.

payload.claim_text: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval. The non-competitive items are listed first, followed by competitive items, and then ratifications. The list will indicate items that require a 2/3 vote and a majority vote of the Board for approval. Procurements are for the current month; in the month of September, the August and September procurements are included. Staff summary documents presented to the Board for approval for items affecting business standards and practices.
payload.description: Recurring agenda item: Procurements - procurement action items requiring Board approval.

records.raw_text: Procurements - List of procurement action items requiring Board approval...
